title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.298 - Loan against policy by policyholder, insurer to give notice of interest due
text:
375.298.  Loan against policy by policyholder, insurer to give notice of interest due. — If a policyholder has taken a loan against an insurance policy, the insurer of such policy shall annually notify the policyholder of any interest due on the loan.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1374 § 1)
